creator: goksin@goksinakdeniz.net
text:
Liferea 1.10.8._1 built without any errors with make and portinstall. I built with "make install" command. It is also built with "portinstall -vp /net/liferea"  It crashes when it is run. Following error is generated.

[goksin@tardis ~]$ liferea

** (liferea:28446): WARNING **: Couldn't load icon: 'emblem-important' icon is not found

** (liferea:28446): WARNING **: Couldn't load icon: 'folder-saved-search' icon is not found.

** (liferea:28446): WARNING **: Couldn't load icon: 'mail-attachment' icon is not found.
Assertion failed: (! _cairo_surface_has_mime_data (surface)), function cairo_surface_mark_dirty_rectangle, file cairo-surface.c, line 1174.
Abort trap: 6 (core dumped.)
[goksin@tardis ~]$ 

I have a coredump file of liferea which is 78.3 MB in size.

How-To-Repeat: Just run it on aan updated 9.2-RELEASE-p5 with an upto date portstree.
